creator: shige@iee.niit.ac.jp
text:
Created attachment 202430
patch for converter/other/pstopnm.c to enable textalphabits option

patch for converter/other/pstopnm.c:

Current pstopnm supports -textalphabits option, as written in the manual, but the option is disabled in the source. I don't the reason why.
Attached patch enables to use it.
